meaning: Town Planning Institute(英国)城市规划学会
examples: TPI is restoring the house to its state in 1959, using sketches, interviews and photographs as guides.
The influence of chlorinated trans 1,4-polyisoprene(CTPI) on the properties of CR/TPI blend was investigated.
The diagnostic sensitivity for LEASD increased and the specificity decreased gradually with decreasing values of TPI.
The stock price of his cement maker TPI Polene declined 19% over the past year.
The 50% prediction interval is generally used to define expected performance within the TPI framework.
